basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially announced the Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was published on 15 May 2026 at NIT Calicut Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria as per the official notification and hold a Ph.D. with consistently good academic record can now submit their online applications from 15 May 2026 to 15 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with consistently good academic record
qualification.details: Assistant Professor Grade II (On Contract): Ph.D. with consistently good academic record. Assistant Professor Grade I: Ph.D. with consistently good academic record and 03 years after Ph.D. or 06 years total teaching and research experience in reputed academic Institute / R&D labs / relevant industry.

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor Grade II (On Contract): Pay Level-10 Assistant Professor Grade I: Pay Level-12

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIT Calicut Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Calicut to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NIT Calicut Assistant Professor recruitment is 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions at NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Assistant Professor Grade II?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for Assistant Professor Grade II is a Ph.D. with a consistently good academic record.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Assistant Professor posts will be as per Pay Level-10 for Grade II and Pay Level-12 for Grade I.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST and Women candidates need to pay ₹500/- for registration, but there is no processing fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official NIT Calicut website.

faq.question: Q7. Where is NIT Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with teaching and research experience apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with 03 years after Ph.D. or 06 years total teaching and research experience are eligible for Assistant Professor Grade I.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITC/P04/456/FR/EDN/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article.
